thinking.text:
This is still not clean - there are many OCR errors like partial commands (e.g., "get all fr_", "Dopen lid", "elose li", "1lid", etc.). The game says 262 moves, but we got 152 unique commands. That's because many commands are only partially captured due to OCR errors (e.g., "open case" vs "open cas_" vs "case").

I need to look at the actual OCR outputs more carefully and manually fix the command list. Let me examine some of the OCR text files to verify the correct commands, then build a clean solution.

Let me check a few specific frames to verify ambiguous commands.
